title: Can we run Query
excerpt: Does Monday.com provide option to query the database using SQL via ODBC connection or any other method. The accounting team wants to add SQL query to their Invoice Reconciliation and pull the Invoice Status from Monday.c…

posts.author: Himanshu.Gupta (Himanshu Gupta)
posts.cookedHtml: Does Monday.com provide option to query the database using SQL via ODBC connection or any other method. The accounting team wants to add SQL query to their Invoice Reconciliation and pull the Invoice Status from Monday.com. Business already has an Excel expert who will add SQL/code to the Excel file. From IT they want to know if it is possible to query Monday.com database and will we grant the query access?

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Himanshu.Gupta,

What you describe is not possible-- have you considered using the API to access this status?

Check out our API docs for more on how to access your board data.
